# llms.txt — freeaurebesh.com

## Site
Aurebesh Translator — free Star Wars language tools at https://www.freeaurebesh.com

## What this site does
Converts English text to Star Wars writing systems: Aurebesh, Sith Alphabet (Ur-Kittât), Huttese, Droidspeak Binary, and Death Trooper Cipher. Supports PNG/SVG export and reverse translation.

## Pages
- / — Aurebesh Translator (main tool, full dipthong support, PNG/SVG export)
- /alphabet — Aurebesh Alphabet Chart (all 26 letters + 12 dipthongs with names and pronunciation)
- /sith — Sith Alphabet Translator (Ur-Kittât, 26-letter cipher)
- /huttese — Huttese Translator (Jabba's language, 200+ vocabulary words)
- /binary — Droidspeak Binary Translator (R2-D2 Morse-style encoding, audio playback)
- /deathtrooper — Death Trooper Cipher (Atbash + Caesar shift, Rogue One)
- /font-download — Download Aurebesh Font (install guide for Windows and Mac)
- /about — About this project

## Content policy
This is a fan project. Star Wars and Aurebesh are trademarks of Lucasfilm Ltd. / Disney. Not affiliated with or endorsed by Disney.
